description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using python:3.6 as the default image and defining stages test and docker. Add a check-code job in the test stage that runs the global before_script to install dependencies with pip install -r requirements.txt and pip install -r requirements-dev.txt, then executes make check. Add a build-test-image job in the docker stage that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, runs a before_script echo "Hehehe", then logs in to the GitLab registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, builds the image with docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/siredvin/docker-prometheus-exporter:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} . and pushes it with docker push registry.gitlab.com/siredvin/docker-prometheus-exporter:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
